name: Brownie Oatmeal Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 powdered egg substitute (1 1/2 tsp mixed with 3 tbsp water)
1/3 cup corn syrup, light or dark (or substitute honey)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the egg replacer, vanilla, and corn syrup in a separate bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, mix dry ingredients: whole wheat flour, sugar, oats, cocoa powder, baking powder, and salt (if using).
3. Make a well in the dry mixture and add the liquid from step 1. Stir until moistened.
4. Spritz a baking sheet with cooking spray.
5. Form about 2 dozen cookies on the prepared baking sheet.
6. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
7. Cool on the baking sheet or wire rack for 5-10 minutes.
